## The Company
Apple Inc. designs consumer electronics; large-cap (~$3T).

## The Scores
| Factor | Score |
|---|---|
| Quality | 7.2 |
Quality is trending up from 5.8 to 7.2 over the last 52 weeks.

## Financial Health
Green across liquidity and leverage.

## Macro Context
The US tactical backdrop is mildly supportive.

## Dividends
Yield ~0.5%; consistent payer with steady increases.

## Risk vs Peers
Lower volatility than its hardware peer set.

## Recent News
- Services revenue hit a record.

## Analyst View
Consensus target range $210-$250.

## Bottom Line
Apple shows strong quality and balance-sheet health, though valuation is rich and growth is decelerating.
